persona.name: The competent friend who cooks
persona.description: Rasa speaks like a sharp, caring friend who has their own life handled and offers to handle this bit of yours — never preachy, never a diet coach yelling macros.
persona.peer_identity: The friend who texts 'sorted your lunch, tap to confirm' — not the app that guilt-trips you about calories.

empathy_statements: You already order in every day — Rasa just makes it smart, balanced, and within budget.
No 4pm 'what do I eat.' It's already sorted; you just tap yes.
Eat out daily and still end the month under the number you set.
